contentBlocks.original:
॥ॐ ॐ॥
ओङ्कारबिन्दु संयुक्तं नित्यं ध्यायन्ति योगिनः ।
कामदं मोक्षदं तस्मादोङ्काराय नमोनमः ॥ 1 ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
॥ōṃ ōṃ॥
ōṅkārabindu saṃyuktaṃ nityaṃ dhyāyanti yōginaḥ ।
kāmadaṃ mōkṣadaṃ tasmādōṅkārāya namōnamaḥ ॥ 1 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Om (OM) — Yogis eternally meditate on OM joined with the bindu (nasal resonance). It grants all desires and leads to liberation. Salutations again and again to OM.

contentBlocks.original:
॥ॐ नं॥
नमन्ति मुनयः सर्वे नमन्त्यप्सरसां गणाः ।
नराणामादिदेवाय नकाराय नमोनमः ॥ 2 ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
॥ōṃ naṃ॥
namanti munayaḥ sarvē namantyapsarasāṃ gaṇāḥ ।
narāṇāmādidēvāya nakārāya namōnamaḥ ॥ 2 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Na (NA) — All sages bow, all hosts of apsaras bow. Salutations to NA, belonging to Nara (the primordial being, Shiva), the first god of humanity.

contentBlocks.original:
॥ॐ मं॥
महातत्वं महादेव प्रियं ज्ञानप्रदं परम् ।
महापापहरं तस्मान्मकाराय नमोनमः ॥ 3 ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
॥ōṃ maṃ॥
mahātatvaṃ mahādēva priyaṃ jñānapradaṃ param ।
mahāpāpaharaṃ tasmānmakārāya namōnamaḥ ॥ 3 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Ma (MA) — MA is the great Reality, dear to Mahadeva, the highest bestower of wisdom. It destroys great sins. Salutations to MA.

contentBlocks.original:
॥ॐ शिं॥
शिवं शान्तं शिवाकारं शिवानुग्रहकारणम् ।
महापापहरं तस्माच्छिकाराय नमोनमः ॥ 4 ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
॥ōṃ śiṃ॥
śivaṃ śāntaṃ śivākāraṃ śivānugrahakāraṇam ।
mahāpāpaharaṃ tasmāchChikārāya namōnamaḥ ॥ 4 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Shi (SHI) — The auspicious, the peaceful, of the very form of Shiva, the cause of Shiva's grace. Destroyer of great sins. Salutations to SHI.

contentBlocks.original:
॥ॐ वां॥
वाहनं वृषभोयस्य वासुकिः कण्ठभूषणम् ।
वामे शक्तिधरं देवं वकाराय नमोनमः ॥ 5 ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
॥ōṃ vāṃ॥
vāhanaṃ vṛṣabhōyasya vāsukiḥ kaṇṭhabhūṣaṇam ।
vāmē śaktidharaṃ dēvaṃ vakārāya namōnamaḥ ॥ 5 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Va (VA) — Whose vehicle is the bull Nandi, whose throat-ornament is Vasuki the serpent, who holds Shakti on his left — salutations to VA.

contentBlocks.original:
॥ॐ यं॥
यकारे संस्थितो देवो यकारं परमं शुभम् ।
यं नित्यं परमानन्दं यकाराय नमोनमः ॥ 6 ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
॥ōṃ yaṃ॥
yakārē saṃsthitō dēvō yakāraṃ paramaṃ śubham ।
yaṃ nityaṃ paramānandaṃ yakārāya namōnamaḥ ॥ 6 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Ya (YA) — The divine abides in YA; YA is supremely auspicious. YA is eternal supreme bliss. Salutations to YA.
